# K&W Mobile Tire Service
> Veteran-owned mobile tire service in Central Florida

## About
K&W Mobile Tire Service is a veteran-owned, licensed and insured mobile tire company serving Volusia, Flagler, and Brevard Counties in Central Florida. Owner Dustin Boyd provides on-site tire repair and replacement for commercial trucks, trailers, RVs, motorhomes, and heavy equipment.

## Services
- Commercial Truck Tire Service (semi-trucks, box trucks, fleet vehicles)
- Trailer Tire Service (utility, flatbed, enclosed, boat, horse trailers)
- RV & Motorhome Tire Service (Class A, Class C, travel trailers, fifth wheels)
- Heavy Equipment Tire Service (forklifts, skid steers, backhoes, tractors)

## Service Areas
- Volusia County: Daytona Beach, DeLand, New Smyrna Beach, Deltona, Ormond Beach, Port Orange, DeBary, Orange City
- Flagler County: Palm Coast, Flagler Beach, Bunnell
- Brevard County: Melbourne, Titusville, Cocoa, Palm Bay, Merritt Island, Rockledge, Cape Canaveral

## Contact
- Phone: (386) 566-7339
- Email: kwmobiletire@gmail.com
- Hours: Monday-Saturday, 7 AM - 7 PM

## FAQ
Q: How quickly can you get to me?
A: Typically 45-90 minutes depending on location and schedule.

Q: Do you carry tires with you?
A: Yes, we stock the most common commercial, trailer, and RV tire sizes.

Q: Are you licensed and insured?
A: Yes, fully licensed, insured, and veteran-owned.

Q: What areas do you cover?
A: Volusia, Flagler, and Brevard Counties in Central Florida.

Q: What are your hours?
A: Monday-Saturday, 7 AM to 7 PM. Emergency after-hours service available.
